mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UB_PAY ( pay_id, matching_number, pay_amount, pay_method, pay_date, pay_status, member_number ) VALUES ( SEQ_PAY.NEXTVAL, #{matchingNumber}, #{payAmount}, '카카오페이', SYSDATE, 'SUCCESS', #{memberNumber} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PAY_ID AS payId, MATCHING_NUMBER AS matchingNumber, PAY_AMOUNT AS payAmount, PAY_METHOD AS payMethod, TO_CHAR(PAY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS payDate, PAY_STATUS AS payStatus, MEMBER_NUMBER AS memberNumber FROM UB_PAY WHERE MEMBER_NUMBER = #{memberNumber} ORDER BY PAY_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
